creator: mickael.maillot@gmail.com
text:
current xbmc port is broken, so i would like to update it to recent 12.0 alpha 7
this release is pretty stable and the beta will follow in few weeks.

a shar of the port can be fetch here ~130k:
http://fneufn.eu/freebsd/xbmc/xbmc.12.a7.port.shar

the port compile fine under all FreeBSD version, tested with redports.
this version run fine on my htpc 9-STABLE amd64 and OSS is now officially supported.
